editor.turnOnImageDragMode: Turn on image drag mode - works only when image is zoomed
editor.exitProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to exit the current project?
editor.deleteLabelConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this label?
editor.deleteImageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
editor.bugsAndFeaturesDescription: Report a bug or propose a new feature

labels.editLabelsMessage: You can now edit the label names you use to describe the objects in the photos. Use the + button to add a new empty text field.
labels.createLabelsMessage: Before you start, you can create a list of labels you plan to assign to objects in your project. You can also choose to skip that part for now and define label names as you go.

import.title: Import {{type}} annotations
import.selectFormat: Select file format you would like to use to import labels.
import.annotationReadyMessage: Annotation is ready to import. After importing, all current annotations will be replaced.
import.importWarning: After import you will lose all your current annotations

export.title: Export {{type}} annotations
export.selectFormat: Select file format you would like to use to export labels.

model.aiMessage: Speed up your annotation process using AI. Don't worry, your photos are still safe. To take care of your privacy, we decided not to send your images to the server, but instead bring AI to you. Make sure that you have a fast and stable connection - it may take a while to load the model.
model.cocoSSDRect: COCO SSD - object detection using rectangles
model.uploadMessage: Drag and drop your own YOLOv5 model converted to tensorflow.js format and speed up annotation process. Make sure to upload all required files: model.json, model shards as well as .txt containing list of detected classes names.
model.downloadMessage: Use one of ours pretrained YOLOv5 models to speed up annotation process.
model.roboflowMessage: Provide details of the Roboflow model you want to run over tha API, as well as your API key.

project.exitMessage: Are you sure you want to leave the editor? You will permanently lose all your progress.

suggest.message: We found objects of classes that are not yet included in the list of labels. Select the names you would like to add. This will help to speed up the labeling process.

loadLabels.title: Load file with labels description
loadLabels.message: Load a text file with a list of labels you are planning to use. The names of each label should be separated by new line. If you don't have a prepared file, no problem. You can create your own list now.
loadLabels.loadUnsuccessful: Loading of labels file was unsuccessful

sizeItUp.windowTooSmall: Ops... This window is too tight for me!
sizeItUp.minSizeRequirement: Please... make it at least {{width}} x {{height}} px.

editorFeatures.openSource: Open source and free to use under GPLv3 license
editorFeatures.noInstall: No advanced installation required, just open up your browser
editorFeatures.noStorage: We don't store your images, because we don't send them anywhere
editorFeatures.multipleLabelTypes: Support multiple label types - rects, lines, points and polygons
editorFeatures.multipleFormats: Support output file formats like YOLO, VOC XML, VGG JSON, CSV
editorFeatures.useAI: Use AI to make your work more productive

emptyLabels.noLabelsYet: No labels created for this image yet

importFormats.cocoJson: Single file in COCO JSON format.
importFormats.yoloFormat: Multiple files in YOLO format along with labels names definition - labels.txt file.
importFormats.vocXml: Multiple files in VOC XML format.
importFormats.polygonCocoJson: Single file in COCO JSON format.

exportFormats.yoloZip: A .zip package containing files in YOLO format.
exportFormats.vocZip: A .zip package containing files in VOC XML format.
exportFormats.vggJson: Single file in VGG JSON format.
exportFormats.cocoJson: Single file in COCO JSON format.
